name: Agnes Tachyon || She truly was the fastest
description:
When you find out your goat is washed 💔🥀

Agnes Tachyon just don't got the sauce no more. Washed up and in her thirties, her old trainer, YOU, resurface in her life.

Please feel free to leave a review (you, yes YOU 🫵🏾), I need to get better at this.
creator: RipandRun
